select `orders`.`id`, GROUP_CONCAT(order_payment.method SEPARATOR "|") as method, `orders`.`increment_id`, `orders`.`base_grand_total`, `orders`.`created_at`, `channel_name`, `channel_id`, `status`, `customer_email`, `orders`.`cart_id` as `items`, `orders`.`seller_make_order_at`, (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(ssp.commission_percent), 0) FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON oi.product_id = ssp.product_id AND ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as seller_avg_commission, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROUND(oi.base_total * (ssp.commission_percent / 100), 2)), 0) FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON oi.product_id = ssp.product_id AND ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as seller_commission_expected, CONCAT(orders.customer_first_name, " ", orders.customer_last_name) as full_name, CONCAT(order_address_billing.city, ", ", order_address_billing.state,", ", order_address_billing.country) as location, `orders`.`seller_approval_status` from `orders` left join `addresses` as `order_address_shipping` on `order_address_shipping`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_shipping`.`address_type` = 'order_shipping' left join `addresses` as `order_address_billing` on `order_address_billing`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_billing`.`address_type` = 'order_billing' left join `order_payment` on `orders`.`id` = `order_payment`.`order_id` where `orders`.`seller_id` = 3 group by `orders`.`id` order by `orders`.`created_at` desc limit 10 offset 0

select count(*) as aggregate from (select `orders`.`id`, GROUP_CONCAT(order_payment.method SEPARATOR "|") as method, `orders`.`increment_id`, `orders`.`base_grand_total`, `orders`.`created_at`, `channel_name`, `channel_id`, `status`, `customer_email`, `orders`.`cart_id` as `items`, `orders`.`seller_make_order_at`, (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(ssp.commission_percent), 0) FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON oi.product_id = ssp.product_id AND ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as seller_avg_commission, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROUND(oi.base_total * (ssp.commission_percent / 100), 2)), 0) FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON oi.product_id = ssp.product_id AND ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as seller_commission_expected, CONCAT(orders.customer_first_name, " ", orders.customer_last_name) as full_name, CONCAT(order_address_billing.city, ", ", order_address_billing.state,", ", order_address_billing.country) as location, `orders`.`seller_approval_status` from `orders` left join `addresses` as `order_address_shipping` on `order_address_shipping`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_shipping`.`address_type` = 'order_shipping' left join `addresses` as `order_address_billing` on `order_address_billing`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_billing`.`address_type` = 'order_billing' left join `order_payment` on `orders`.`id` = `order_payment`.`order_id` where `orders`.`seller_id` = 3 group by `orders`.`id`) as `aggregate_table`

select `orders`.`id`, GROUP_CONCAT(order_payment.method SEPARATOR "|") as method, `orders`.`increment_id`, `orders`.`base_grand_total`, `orders`.`created_at`, `channel_name`, `channel_id`, `status`, `customer_email`, `orders`.`cart_id` as `items`, `orders`.`seller_make_order_at`, (SELECT COALESCE(AVG(ssp.commission_percent), 0) FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON oi.product_id = ssp.product_id AND ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as seller_avg_commission, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ROUND(oi.base_total * (ssp.commission_percent / 100), 2)), 0) FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN seller_store_products ssp ON oi.product_id = ssp.product_id AND ssp.seller_id = orders.seller_id WHERE oi.order_id = orders.id AND oi.parent_id IS NULL) as seller_commission_expected, CONCAT(orders.customer_first_name, " ", orders.customer_last_name) as full_name, CONCAT(order_address_billing.city, ", ", order_address_billing.state,", ", order_address_billing.country) as location, `orders`.`seller_approval_status` from `orders` left join `addresses` as `order_address_shipping` on `order_address_shipping`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_shipping`.`address_type` = 'order_shipping' left join `addresses` as `order_address_billing` on `order_address_billing`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` and `order_address_billing`.`address_type` = 'order_billing' left join `order_payment` on `orders`.`id` = `order_payment`.`order_id` where `orders`.`seller_id` = 3 group by `orders`.`id` order by `orders`.`created_at` desc limit 10 offset 0
